title: Within A Few Degrees: A Little Gest of Bob Frank
original_title: Within A Few Degrees: A Little Gest of Bob Frank
overview: Explores the enigmatic career of late folk-musician Bob Frank, his disappearance after the release of his 1972 debut album, and the cult-following it accumulated in the following decades.
